name: Blackstone Inc.
lede: Blackstone runs two centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Gurugram, covering SSC and CoE, built over 21 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Blackstone office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Blackstone Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Blackstone runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Gurugram), covering SSC and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Blackstone's India footprint covers Mumbai and Gurugram, spanning SSC and CoE. The centers deliver Finance & Accounting for the group's global operations.
